incidents.user_impact: Cluster runtime expanded and the SLA window is at risk.
incidents.recommended_action: Salt the skewed key, raise shuffle partitions, and backfill the worst partition range.
incidents.customer_summary: Meridian Energy load_forecast_training is degraded because of skewed shuffle.
incidents.summary_line: skewed shuffle on load_forecast_training for Meridian Energy with reliability 28.0.

incidents.user_impact: Shared cluster is saturated; customer dashboards may lag.
incidents.recommended_action: Move the workload to a reserved pool and shift the low-priority jobs out of the same window.
incidents.customer_summary: Helios Logistics route_optimizer_features is degraded because of queue saturation.
incidents.summary_line: queue saturation on route_optimizer_features for Helios Logistics with reliability 27.7.

incidents.user_impact: Feature refresh delayed; agent recommendations are partially stale.
incidents.recommended_action: Increase executor memory for the hot stage, rebalance partitions, and re-run the failed slice.
incidents.customer_summary: Nova Retail recommendation_features is failed because of executor oom.
incidents.summary_line: executor oom on recommendation_features for Nova Retail with reliability 8.0.

incidents.user_impact: Downstream publish paused while metastore retries cleared.
incidents.recommended_action: Retry against a warm catalog replica and stagger metadata-heavy jobs away from the publish window.
incidents.customer_summary: Atlas Health claims_feature_extract is failed because of metadata timeout.
incidents.summary_line: metadata timeout on claims_feature_extract for Atlas Health with reliability 50.5.

recent_activity.detail: Loaded the GitHub Pages snapshot for the ForwardOps Incident Console.
